bead.title: ts-sdk-error-enum: stable error_code discriminant via codegen manifest
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] schema/auth-errors.manifest.json exists at workspace root
- [ ] Variant count matches AUTH_ERROR_VARIANT_COUNT (currently 15 after B4)
- [ ] Rust parity test crates/axon-core/tests/auth_error_manifest_test.rs green
- [ ] TS SDK auth-error-codes.ts with AUTH_ERROR_CODES array, AuthErrorCode type, AUTH_ERROR_STATUS map
- [ ] TS parity test reads same manifest and asserts equivalence
- [ ] AxonHttpError uses AuthErrorCode type + isAuthError() narrowing helper
- [ ] bun test + cargo test green
- [ ] cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings clean
- [ ] L8 golden client test deferred — file follow-up bead if desired
